title: SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 812-0849 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 812-0849 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries Medicare Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - STAND BY ME PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBANY OFFICE
